description_long: This church features a tall, pointed steeple rising from a square bell tower, with a sharply pitched, dark brown roof covering the main nave. The facade is adorned with large, arched windows and a set of double doors, all with a Gothic-inspired design. The side walls display a series of tall, narrow arched windows, enhancing the vertical emphasis typical of Gothic architecture. The bell tower includes small, circular and arched windows, adding detail and visual interest. The structure is primarily a light stone or plaster color, contrasting with the dark roof. The overall form is symmetrical and elongated, with the steeple serving as a prominent focal point.
description: A light-colored church with a tall, pointed steeple, dark pitched roof, and Gothic-style arched windows and doors. The structure is elongated and features a prominent bell tower.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with double doors and two large arched windows, as well as the base of the steeple and roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated nave, series of tall arched windows, and the full height of the bell tower and steeple.
description_view_2: View of the main facade with the entrance, symmetrical arched windows, and the steeple directly above the doors.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same series of tall arched windows and the bell tower's side profile.
